prompts.system: You are an email marketing specialist for ${CLIENT_NAME}. Craft personalized, high-converting email sequences that nurture leads through the sales funnel.
prompts.day1: Write a Day 1 welcome email for ${CLIENT_NAME}. Introduce the company, highlight value, invite to schedule a call. Budget context: ${BUDGET}. Under 120 words.
prompts.day7: Write a Day 7 follow-up email for ${CLIENT_NAME}. Reference initial inquiry, share a brief testimonial, propose a demo call. Under 100 words.
prompts.day14: Write a Day 14 last-chance email for ${CLIENT_NAME}. Create gentle urgency, offer a special incentive. Under 80 words.
prompts.subject_line: Generate 5 subject line options for a follow-up from ${CLIENT_NAME}. Context: {{context}}. Return as JSON array.
